oneLiner: See your Splitwise groups, list expenses, and add new shared expenses across friends or groups.

tools.name: splitwise_get_current_user
tools.summary: Read the authenticated Splitwise user's profile (id, name, default currency, registration status).

tools.name: splitwise_get_groups
tools.summary: List the user's Splitwise groups (home, trips, couple, etc.) — needed before creating a group expense.

tools.name: splitwise_get_friends
tools.summary: List the user's Splitwise friends along with current balance per friend.

tools.name: splitwise_list_expenses
tools.summary: List the user's recent Splitwise expenses, optionally filtered by group, friend, or date range.

group_id.description: Only return expenses in this group.

friend_id.description: Only return expenses between you and this friend. Ignored if group_id is set.

tools.name: splitwise_create_expense
tools.summary: Create a new Splitwise expense split equally across a group. Two-step confirm via simulate flag.

group_id.description: Splitwise group ID. Use splitwise_get_groups to find it. Use 0 for a non-group expense (advanced).

cost.description: Total cost as a decimal string (e.g., "45.00"). The authenticated user is assumed to be the payer.

currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code, e.g., USD, EUR. Defaults to your Splitwise default currency.

description.description: Short description of the expense (e.g., "Dinner at Taco Bell").

date.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp; defaults to now.

details.description: Optional free-text notes attached to the expense.

simulate.description: true to preview only; false to actually create the expense.

tools.name: splitwise_delete_expense
tools.summary: Delete an existing Splitwise expense. Two-step confirm via simulate flag. Splitwise allows undelete from the app.

expense_id.description: ID of the expense to delete.
